summary: Complete testing of 3 P0 features: 1) Catalogo Articoli CRUD, 2) Payment Tracking (Scadenze), 3) Invoice Duplicate. Backend: 23/23 tests PASS (fixed duplicate_invoice bug). Frontend: All pages and components verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

backend_articoli_crud.GET /api/articoli/: PASS - Returns list with total count
backend_articoli_crud.GET /api/articoli/{id}: PASS - Returns articolo with price history
backend_articoli_crud.PUT /api/articoli/{id}: PASS - Updates and adds to storico_prezzi when price changes
backend_articoli_crud.DELETE /api/articoli/{id}: PASS - Deletes articolo, returns 404 on re-fetch
backend_articoli_crud.GET /api/articoli/search?q=xxx: PASS - Returns matching articles for autocomplete

backend_payment_tracking.GET /api/invoices/{id}/scadenze: PASS - Returns total, pagato, residuo, payment_status

backend_invoice_duplicate.POST /api/invoices/{id}/duplicate: PASS - Creates new invoice as bozza with reset payment fields

backend_auth.unauthenticated_requests: PASS - Return 401 for all protected endpoints

frontend_articoli_page.table_columns: PASS - Codice, Descrizione, Categoria, U.M., Prezzo, IVA, Fornitore
frontend_articoli_page.row_actions: PASS - History, Edit, Delete buttons with data-testid

frontend_articoli_dialog.title: PASS - 'Nuovo Articolo' / 'Modifica Articolo'
frontend_articoli_dialog.fields: PASS - codice, descrizione, categoria, unita_misura, prezzo_unitario, aliquota_iva, fornitore_nome, note
frontend_articoli_dialog.create_flow: PASS - Toast 'Articolo creato', dialog closes, table updates

frontend_invoices_page.kpi_cards: PASS - Totale Fatturato, Incassato, Da Incassare with data-testid
frontend_invoices_page.filters: PASS - Type, Status, Year dropdowns with data-testid
frontend_invoices_page.footer_totals: PASS - Shows Totale, Pagato, Residuo sums

frontend_invoices_dropdown.menu_items: PASS - Visualizza, Duplica, Scarica PDF, Esporta XML, Gestisci Pagamenti

frontend_payment_dialog.payment_history: PASS - List of previous payments with delete option
frontend_payment_dialog.payment_form: PASS - Importo, Data, Metodo, Note fields

frontend_invoice_editor.article_search: PASS - Search icon visible in code field
frontend_invoice_editor.autocomplete: PASS - Dropdown shows matching articles when typing
frontend_invoice_editor.line_fields: PASS - code, description, quantity, price with data-testid

frontend_sidebar.catalogo_articoli: PASS - Nav item present between Fornitori and Rilievi

bugs_fixed.issue: duplicate_invoice endpoint returned 500 due to doc_type being string instead of DocumentType enum
bugs_fixed.fix: Added DocumentType(doc_type_str) conversion before calling get_next_number()

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 P0 features fully implemented and working
Fixed duplicate_invoice bug - doc_type string to enum conversion
Payment tracking correctly updates invoice status (non_pagata → parzialmente_pagata → pagata)
ArticleSearch component integrates seamlessly in InvoiceEditorPage
seed_data_creation: Created test articolo UI_TEST_001 during UI test (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested: 1) ArticoliPage with CRUD + search + bulk-import, 2) InvoicesPage with KPI cards and Pagato/Da Pagare columns, payment dialog (Scadenze), 3) InvoiceEditorPage with ArticleSearch autocomplete component. Fixed bug in duplicate_invoice where doc_type string was passed to get_next_number instead of DocumentType enum. All data-testids in place for testing.
